## registerApiKeyFlag() function

Register the --api-key flag. Use this for plugins that call the Stripe API directly.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function registerApiKeyFlag<T>(pluginYargs: Argv<T>): Argv<T & ApiKeyFlags>
```
